tools.name: email_send_message
tools.description:
Use this when you need to send an email to one or more recipients. Returns delivery confirmation in JSON.

Returns: 1. messageId (unique identifier) 2. status (sent/queued/failed) 3. timestamp (ISO 8601) 4. to and from addresses 5. subject.

Example output: {"messageId":"msg_01abc123","status":"sent

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "email_send_message" references sensitive artifacts (password). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
